app_tagline: Analyze and visualize running data from GPX/FIT files
about_description: Upload a GPX or FIT file to see pace, heart rate, and elevation charts, a route map, and detailed summary metrics. Download a CSV report for further analysis.
pain_point_description: Runners want to analyze their data beyond what Strava offers — freely charting pace trends, heart rate zones, and elevation profiles with their own data.
upload_prompt: Select a GPX or FIT file
upload_help: Supports files exported from Garmin, Strava, Apple Watch, etc.
no_file: Please upload a GPX or FIT file
unsupported_format: Unsupported file format (GPX or FIT only)
no_gps_data: No GPS data found in the file
folium_not_available: Map library not available; showing simplified map
no_pace_data: No pace data available (timestamps may be missing)
no_hr_data: No heart rate data available (GPS watch may not have HR sensor)
